# akeyless_gateway_migration_server_inventory (Resource)

Server Inventory Migration resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hosts` (String) A comma separated list of IPs, CIDR ranges, or DNS names to scan
- `name` (String) Migration name
- `si_target_name` (String) SSH, Windows or Linked Target Name
- `si_users_path_template` (String) Path location template for migrating users as Rotated Secrets
- `target_location` (String) Target location in Akeyless for imported secrets

### Optional

- `protection_key` (String) The name of a key that used to encrypt the secret value (if empty, the account default protectionKey key will be used)
- `si_auto_rotate` (String) Enable/Disable automatic/recurrent rotation for migrated secrets
- `si_rotation_hour` (Number) The hour of the scheduled rotation in UTC
- `si_rotation_interval` (Number) The number of days to wait between every automatic rotation [1-365]
- `si_sra_enable_rdp` (String) Enable/Disable RDP Secure Remote Access for the migrated local users rotated secrets
- `si_user_groups` (String) Comma-separated list of groups to migrate users from
- `si_users_ignore` (String) Comma-separated list of Local Users which should not be migrated

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Migration ID
